chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2808 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 13.05.2025 M/s Kashif Hanif and Waqar Ahmed, advocates for applicants Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl: Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Applicants Mst. Rukhsana Rashid and Rashid seek pre- arrest bail in FIR No.576 of 2024, registered at P.S. Shahrah-e- Noor Jahan, Karachi for offence under Sections 302, 34, PPC, after rejection of their bail plea by learned Additional Sessions Judge-VII/MCTC-2, Karachi Central vide order dated 26.11.2024. Learned counsel for applicants/accused, at the very outset, submits that during investigation applicants are found innocent and IO has placed their names in Column-2 of challan, which has been accepted by learned Magistrate concerned. He further submits that interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants may be confirmed on the ground that complainant can approach to next forum against acceptance of challan. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has no recorded no objection. In view of such position, interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants/accused by this Court vide order dated 02.12.2024 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Instant criminal bail application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
